description: Interesting & clear to use inc good layout. The software is very fast & works faultlessly.
author: Stephen W.
pros: The software is very dynamic & adaptable to seek any kind of data required
cons: Have found no problems so far. None that I know of.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Software for Professional Data Management and Reporting
description: Indigo DQM efficiently manages all our data assets, marketing information and enables us to create new data with the web scraping and file harvesting functionality. It has increased our business capabilities and value. The benefit to our business is enormous with this powerful software!
author: Elvin J.
pros: They have thought of practically everything with this advanced software product which is clearly aimed at businesses and IT professionals aiming to make the most of all their data assets and produce advanced reports and outputs. So much functionality and features built in as standard and can convert, process and query so many different data sources and types. Even includes web scraping as standard. Highly recommended!
cons: Nothing at all although you do need some technical knowledge to design the queries in the data management studio.

description: Our particular business sits in a very competitive marketplace so this DQM software has worked well for us so far. Does require some ‘techy’ knowledge but reckon it’s worth the extra effort there. Mainly use web scrape/crawl/ mine features and resulting data processing gives us our reports but it seems the possibilities are endless if you’re that way inclined. Analytics results a real coo, let’s just say our web guy is now earning his money! Decent after service for queries relevant regular updates received. A+ product certainly a good addition and ultra-modern approach
author: Richard D.
pros: Indigo DQM has worked well for us so far. Mainly use web scrape/crawl/ mine features and resulting data processing gives us our reports but it seems the possibilities are endless
cons: Does require some ‘techy’ knowledge but reckon it’s worth the extra effort there. Learning curve is relatively steep but worthwhile
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Indigo DQM is superb software product for Data Management and Reporting in the finance industry
author: Mark F.
pros: As a Compliance Officer and someone who has worked in the finance industry for a long time, I understand how critically important it is to have quality Data and Management Information (MI) to rely upon. Where further improvements are required then further granular detail can also be data mined and reported on. Indigo DQM is an extremely powerful software tool for data processing, data management, data analysis and report outputs. It is very useful to pull together data from various different sources into meaningful and useful reports. This is where Indigo DQM comes into its own and excels by allowing consolidation of data into the so called data asset stores. I have no hesitation in recommending this product whatsoever!
cons: It does require some technical knowledge which an IT department would have no issue with understanding in order to make full use of all the extensive features within the software.

review_title: Very good software at an excellent price
description: I've been happy with the software and with the Indigo team.
author: Nick W.
pros: Great price Software is easy to implement and use if you have an understanding of your data and what you need from the software Comprehensive toolset Extremely good support and technical assistance
cons: It's possible that more expensive packages will have more bespoke tools but [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and his team are always keen for feedback and they've yet to let me down even if I needed something added to the software. Usually, it was there all along and I wasn't looking properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It saves my time and effort when it comes to handling many data assets from regions to consolidate them at one data asset and to control it easily and generate advanced reports out of it.
author: King F.
pros: it does consolidate databases into one central database and then you can generate reports. Easily to run queries as relational SQL and much more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very powerful and unique product for handling data, and producing reports!
description: Used for managing and maximising my image data, this powerful and unique product is a true business asset. The reports it can output from numerous data sources are an invaluable tool for viewing my data in an understandable `real world sense. Highly recommended!
author: Craig E.
